reviews.review_text:
Denmark Scenic Tourist Park est un très bel endroit, idéal pour profiter d’un séjour au calme dans un cadre magnifique. Le camping porte très bien son nom : le panorama est superbe et l’environnement est vraiment agréable.

L’ambiance est paisible, parfaite pour se reposer et apprécier la nature autour de Denmark. C’est un lieu propre, bien situé et très plaisant pour faire une pause pendant un voyage dans la région.

Nous avons beaucoup apprécié le calme, la vue et l’atmosphère générale du parc. Une très belle adresse que je recommande sans hésiter !

No privacy.
Couldn't open room windows, so poor ventilation.
Can hear other people in neighbouring rooms easily.
Service from staff poor and intimidating.
Has a nice view of surrounding mountains.

Overpriced. Instructions and park rules are inconsistent: some say check in online, some say you must come to the office on arrival, there’s a lock box but differing instructions on how to return the key.

Instructions for the laundry are incorrect: we specifically brought $1 coins but it turns out you need a specific ratio of $1 and $2 coins and they only exchange change before 5pm. It’s 2026, install a coin machine or eftpos.

The sunset view is nice.

Absolutely terrible customer service, last two nights have had the manager come 10 mins before Curfew to tell us about the 10pm cutoff for noise. We were well aware of the camp ground rules and even had an alarm set as a reminder. We have booked half the caravan park for a 70th. We have paid a fortune to be treated poorly. Had a text earlier about kms in caravan park and about kids wearing helmets…all our kids were wearing helmets  feeling targeted. Not happy. Lovely location will not stay again

Place is lovely, confusing set up. Map arrived upside down. There is no office, had to check in online.  Got the check in message on day of driving 5 1/2 hours so had to pull over to check in and put my card details on an unknown link so wasn’t happy with that and had $100 deposit deducted. Room had some Easter decorations that was a cute surprise.  Signs are clear 10pm …no noise.  1st night had someone come at 9.45 and second night 9.50.  Honestly give people a chance to do the right thing or change the time to 9.30pm. It just made me angry and I am usually quite a chilled person. Views are lovely, rooms are clean.  Perfect for people travelling on their own that plan on being in bed by 9.30pm and sightseeing through the days.

We had a great family stay in Denmark. The accommodation was clean, quiet, and very comfortable. The surrounding nature and beaches are stunning, and the town has a lovely relaxed vibe. Perfect place for a peaceful holiday with family. Highly recommended!”

I recently stayed at this hotel and I couldn't be happier with my choice. The rooms are incredibly spacious and sparkling clean, providing a very comfortable environment to relax. The staff members are exceptionally attentive and went out of their way to ensure everything was perfect during my stay.Another huge plus is the location—it’s absolutely excellent and close to everything, 5min by car from the town center. If you are looking for a place that combines comfort, great service, and a prime location, this is it. It is definitely worth staying here
Really useful for a night, private shower and toilet change everything
Ensuite spotless. Drive thru site plenty of room. Nice quiet park even almost full. Recommend.

In a word - Fantastic!!!
What a picturesque outlook over the valleys, great accommodation and facilities are all clean and very modern. 10/10 anyone would be happy here.

When I booked The Denmark Scenic park I wasn’t really expecting to much ! In fact,what an outstanding place to stay,with a large choices of places to stay from private houses cabins smaller cabins and caravan spots with up to date accommodation.
Nestled away about 4km above Denmark with incredible views of the beaches town and close to everything beaches food options and incredible wineries.Beautiful keep grounds and extremely quiet.
I highly recommend staying here and will be back when next in Denmark.
Thank you 🙏

Stayed for 2 nights in one of the suite, so noisy neighbours were loud, feels like they are in the room with you!! Its only a thin door in-between 6.30am it started, then caretaker blowing leaves away!! Not long after, maybe the cabins are more peaceful? Plenty of parking, scenery is amazing, rooms are clean and nice beds.

IGA, pizza palour, petrol stations,cafes, bottle shop nearby with lots of parking. (6mins)

We enjoyed our stay at Denmark Scenic Tourist Park. Our three-bedroom cabin was very tidy and comfortable, with everything looking brand new. The kitchen was fully equipped with quality cookware, and the surrounding environment was spectacular. The only minor drawbacks were the poor internet connection—though this wasn’t an issue for us as we wanted a break from screens. We also didn't like the close proximity of neighbouring cabins. Thanks,

Stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin which was very clean and modern as you'd expect given they're only 12 months old. The location and view was fantastic. Price was slightly on the higher end, but felt it was worth it, especially in peak season. Can't fault the place.
A little pricier then the average camp site but comes with a private ensuit with toilet shower and sink (plus heater) which is lovely. The lookout area is fantastic with a wooden deck and BBQ

The Pros
- Lovely big en-suite with ample hot water
- Nice drive up to it and beautiful views

The Cons
- No atmosphere
- Seating area is adjacent to the next en-suite, you can literally hear them chewing their food
- A distance from town

Would I stay again?
- Probably not, prefer the standard tourist park feel
Great stay
Amazing place, peaceful, scenic clean and roomy. Will be back!
Stayed 2 nights at park. Bit confusing at first office not open they asked what time they could expected us but still check in.Dave the man we dealt with was great. Helpful and very friendly.

Omg . I love to travel and these rooms are the stuff  of legends . Great hot water beds to sleep well .the room nice and big . More can learn what these have . Will be back often .
Great value fir money . Thank you very much
Amazing ambience and very comfortable.
Fantastic...What a clean and neat place to enjoy the break..Amazing view..
Amazing place accommodation was competitively priced and very modern with outstanding views

Karri Aura is a really nice place to stay as a family. The rooms are clean, and well supplied. Staff are friendly and helpful. The location is also near to many nice places within short driving distances. Given the opportunity, I will stay there again.
Hands down the nicest place we have stayed the views were breathtaking i highly recommend this place
Thank you Karri Aura for a great couple of nights. What a beautiful place to stay!
The sunset view is breathtaking. Would have loved to stay longer if not for my schedule.

Do yourself a favour.  Check in here for a lovely relaxing stay. Rolling green grass hills and fruit trees at the back door. Birds chirping happily.  Mountain views all around. It's well worth taking the time out to stay here. Self-containedd accommodation. Playground for the kids and a fire pit. Straight shot into town for whatever you need.  Highly recommend the Supa IGA
Loved our stay here. Beautiful rooms with amazing views. So clean and tidy.
Excellent friendly place.
A lovely place to stay, clean ensuites, great value. Stunning views.

This is a beautiful location, fairly close to town, with amazing views over the hills and the bay.|We booked a 2 bedroom villa, 3 adults, four nights.|Villa was very clean with comfortable beds though little space for luggage. |Good kitchen facilities with full-sized oven, fridge/freezer and dishwasher.|Bathroom/toilet also very clean.|Downside, we didn't have any milk, bodywash, facial tissues or extra toilet roll in chalet on arrival. There was 1 face cloth, 1 hand towel, 3 bathsheets provided for 3 adults staying 4 nights. Site managers would only provide 1 further bathsheet plus 1 toilet roll and did refill bodywash, they made us feel uncomfortable asking for these things.|Clean and tidy on site laundry facilities are available but do remember to take detergent as none is provided or available to purchase.|Karri Aura is a gorgeous place to stay, site managers could do with being a little more generous with provisions and making guests feel welcome.
Staff are so arrogant and caused some many dramas for me never will go there again absolute waste of money
Clean amenities, friendly caretakers. All good.
Amazing stay in their new cabin! Top notch amenities. Can’t wait to be back!!

Booked this place over the phone (4 nights) and asked if there is any deals with G’day or other memberships, they said no. After the office was closed,I tried to book our friends in on their website and find out that they  have “special” on. Next day I went to ask if they can give us the same deal (stay 4 pay for 3),unfortunately the receptionist Kylie was not willing to budge and explained, that to get that deal I had to ask for it literally. (I thought, I had over the phone at the first place…). She came up with all the excuses and technicalities why we can’t get it. Anyway ,in the end I was called a bully for  respectfully asking questions. Bottom line is, the caravan park is lovely with nice facilities, but Kylie and  her husband were full of themselves and not wanting to hear anything from me. Therefore giving 1* for greedy inflexible staff.

We stayed in a caravan site with a huge spotlessly clean ensuite where you can enjoy the space under the roof rather than putting out your awning.  It was so quiet, it felt like we were the only ones there.  If you walk up the hill you have magnificent views.  Look forward to coming back.

Booked this place over the phone (4 nights) and asked if there is any deals with G’day or other memberships, they said no. After the office was closed,I tried to book our friends in on their website and find out that they  have “special” on. Next day I went to ask if they can give us the same deal (stay 4 pay for 3),unfortunately the receptionist Kylie was not willing to budge and explained, that to get that deal I had to ask for it literally. (I thought, I had over the phone at the first place…). She came up with all the excuses and technicalities why we can’t get it. Anyway ,in the end I was called a bully for  respectfully asking questions. Bottom line is, the caravan park is lovely with nice facilities, but Kylie and  her husband were full of themselves and not wanting to hear anything from me. Therefore giving 1* for greedy inflexible staff.

Beautiful peaceful location
Rooms are lovely and clean
Love the little added touches of a sweet on the bed,  biscuits to enjoy while having a cuppa sitting on the verandah taking in the scenery
Bbq & laundry facilities are a great addition for families
Playground was a hit with my grandson
Very pleasant stay would highly recommend to all my peers

What a lovely, peaceful park! Absolutely loved our stay here.  🦜 ❤️
Loved the drive through bays and the amazing, very large ensuite! 😄
Loved the “about a dog” toilet paper helping animals 🐾
The camp kitchen was great, loved the facilities and the cheap $3 washing.
Only thing I would say is there is only 1 washing line (another one would be great), which was full the whole time we were there, so we had to buy a fold out washing line to do a much needed wash. 👕
Thank you for the great service too! Would definitely recommend. 👍
Great little caravan park on top of Mt Shadforth. Drive through sites make it a breeze and all sites have ensuites. Very well priced even in peak holiday periods.
Relaxing place with amazing sunset views, en-suite are a treat, nice shared kitchen area, recommended.
Beautiful atmosphere.

100% agree with Chris Pethybrbridge. We had a similar experience with this "person" .Why these people choose to work in the tourist industry is  mystery??  We could not possibly recommend KarriAura while that person is there..

OMG.  Where do I start.  Is this the best park in WA? I think so.  Facilities, gardens views...everything. You guys are amazing.  My new favourite, I will be back regularly and longer.  Thank you so much.  We were in an ensuite caravan site.  Drive through site, perfect bathroom and space and the staff are the best.

Good place to stay with a beautiful mountain view. Neat rooms with all the facilities you need to spend few memorable days at Denmark. Will definitely visit again.

(p.s - The Google map location is slightly wrong, it directs you to the very next 'Chimes Spa retreat'. So, please look for the sign board of Karri Aura)
Lovely small park, not saying too much cause want to keep for myself!     Will definitely visit again, thank you Karri Aura, wonderful clean facilites and view... just peaceful... mine. 🙏

Made a last minute booking and what a find!

En-suite site was fabulous.  En-suites were large, modern and spotless.  Sites all drive through and a good size.

Camp kitchen and laundry, small but functional and super clean.

Close to town but beautiful spot up on the mountain.  Would definitely stay again.

Dog friendly

NO TENT PEGS!
Ok now that that has been said, the owners are very nice and the ensuites are spotless. Easy pull through sealed sites with a small but picturesque bbq area/ campers kitchen with washing machines, microwave, small fridge/freezer and playground.
Loving it - will come again!

First time we came here was in December 2023 going from Victoria to Western Australia . We found  this ensuite accomodation (lucky strike) 😎|We were only staying for one night but ended  up staying for 5 nights. Had the best time. Got lost on an extensive Dogwalk .. ha ha.🤣and were saved calling Jeanette (the amazing owner) at Kerrie Aura which worked out where we were and went out of her way to pick us up with a smile . What an unusual and outstanding experience the whole stay was 😉 Friendly, warm and divine 🙏Owners that go out of their way to give you the opportunity to  have an experience with something truly special. |The first  time we stayed here was around Christmas and there were the most wonderful Xmas decorations and lighting to celebrate the occasion like the home away from home. Several weeks later on our trip back  to Victoria we looked forward to come back to Kerrie Aura again …planning for 2 days but I think it will be 5 days again because we have already connected to a couple of groups that want to catch up for a drink or talk and the dogs agree.  All we can hear while we writing this is the happy chatting of people here connecting to each other. Just driving home a bit faster because the rest is just going to be overnight stays .  Even the price is really affordable .. what the ….are you waiting for. ??

Just had a fantastic 3 day stay in the best small caravan park. If you’re looking for spotlessly clean sites with toilet and ensuite, friendly staff and surrounded by nature this the park we recommend. If we travel through Denmark again we will definitely stay here. Oh and a bonus was friendly staff
Quiet, clean with picturesque surroundings.  A place for a good break after long hours of driving travelling around WA
